untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for inverted cup-with-handle formation (U-shaped volume curve detection, cup rim identification, handle formation detection) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. These require shape detection and multi-bar pattern analysis beyond point-in-time price/volume/moving average comparisons. Stop placement and price target rules marked AUTHOR_SILENT in original signal.
translation_notes: Translated breakout confirmation requirement to: price closing below previous high (cup rim break) combined with volume above 20-period average (confirming U-shaped volume). Exit rule uses reversal of entry condition (price reclosing above rim) as reasonable interpretation given AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. The actual inverted cup pattern formation itself cannot be codified without shape-detection capability.
